text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Mm, sounds good. Lookin' forward to it! Hehe. Whew! Just 'cause it's
practice doesn't mean I'm gonna go easy on you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Of course! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that day, Sakura Chiyono O has been back on the track
from morning until evening, hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, starting tomorrow I'll try a faster pace during rest intervals
and... Oh, hello!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's poring over the notebook she once dropped in front of me, her
"Chiyonotes."
choice_data_list: Putting those Chiyonotes to good use, I see.
Putting those Chiyonotes to good use, I see.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
These pages contain everything I've learned up until now. I want to
fight with all I've got... or that's the idea, at least.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Because if I'm not in it to win it, well... what's the point?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon enough, the day of her practice race with Maruzensky arrives.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um... T-today, I... I'm going to run like it's the Japanese Derby! And I
hope you will too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm honored. Well, I guess I'll just have to pull out all the stops
then.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Hey, look over there! Maruzen's walking up to the gate... with
Chiyo?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As spectators trickle in, the left-handed race over 2,400 meters of
life-changing turf begins!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Maruzen just keeps widening her lead. But Chiyo is playing it
totally cool. I know I'd panic and shift gears right away if it was me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Strategy? Well... I do sort of have something in mind.
Basically...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I try to keep up with the fast pace Maruzen likes to set, it'll become
a battle of endurance, which I can't win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So no matter how big a lead she gets, I have to run at my own pace
and conserve strength.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And then... a-as I head into the final corner, I'll pick up the pace,
somehow close the gap to Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And once I close the gap, if I can just hold on and come out slightly ahead at the very end... No, not "if"! I will, and then I... I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I'm lacking in almost every department... But if I'm
going to win, I think that's the best shot I have!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Calm down. Just calm down, and keep your own pace... We're almost
at the final corner!)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Now! Hahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: (...That acceleration! I didn't think she had so much left in the tank.)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: (...I see you, Chiyo. You really want this, don't you?)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (So close now. Finish the job. Now's the time to pull ahead!)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hryahhh!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Geez, Maruzensky's acceleration is really something else! ...Wait,
Chiyo's catching up!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... No, I'm not done yet! Faster! Faster! FASTER!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyrahhh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(...Still out of reach. I planned, fought with everything I had, and it
still wasn't good enough.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (Nothing's changed. She's still so far away...)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the killer race! It's been a minute since I felt a thrill like
that! Good luck in the real Japanese Derby. Do what I could only
dream of doing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You would entrust your dreams... to me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Mhm. I wouldn't entrust them to anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I... I thought I would break! You always felt larger than life, so far
out of reach!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Every time I ran, I would get scared, and couldn't win a single race!
But... but still...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I... I want to stand by your side!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And I... I swear, I will win the Japanese Derby! I will become the number one runner!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So when... when that happens, when I'm stronger... Will you run with
me again?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the sun itself smiling down on her, Chiyono O's race of a lifetime
comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Afterwards, as I'm on my way back to my office...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, e-excuse me! Will you be my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You made this happen! You were the one who helped me remember
my feelings for Maruzen, who gave me the push on the back I
needed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So when I make it big—when I have my next showdown with
Maruzen—I want you to be by my side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her unwavering drive to grow as a runner makes me want to see just
how far she'll go. I have no reason to decline.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, um, yay! Thank you so much! Uhh, in that case... to
commemorate this moment, here's a proverb that just came to me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"The carrot knows not when the rain will fall." I look forward to
working with you, Trainer!
